_publications._publicationTitle: Survival of Human Neurofibroma in Immunodeficient Mice and Initial Results of Therapy With Pirfenidone

_contextSnippet: Survival of neurofibromas in animals treated with pirfenidone was lower than in control animals, irrespective of the location of implanted tumor
details: Survival of neurofibromas was lower in pirfenidone-treated animals compared to controls, irrespective of implantation location
